plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-513 RP16.P09.M06.S13-RP16.P09.M10.S10 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-513 implements descriptor-only coverage of the RP16.P09 closeout handoff slice: the M06 Synthetic Fixture Set tail (the eight remaining rows), the full M07 Test And Golden Case Set cycle (twenty-two rows), the full M08 Hermes Evidence Packet cycle (twenty rows), the full M09 Claude Review Packet cycle (twenty rows), and the full M10 Closeout And Next Handoff cycle (ten rows) as five descriptor-only sections over 80 planned rows with Hermes evidence (H16), Claude review packet (C16), and CP00-514 handoff closing RP16 Governance DLP Retention and routing to RP17 AI Governance, without opening governance, DLP, legal hold, or retention runtime or any other closed runtime surface.

parsed_review.summary: CP00-513 is a descriptor-only governance closeout-handoff slice covering 80 RP16.P09 units (RP16.P09.M06.S13–RP16.P09.M10.S10): the M06 Synthetic Fixture Set tail (8 rows) plus the full M07 (22), M08 (20), M09 (20), and M10 (10) cycles, closing RP16 Governance DLP Retention and routing to RP17.P00.M00.S01. Independent read-only inspection confirms the pack binding (registry.js:562), contract current_pack (governance-core-contract.json:16), p09_closeout_handoff_slice_descriptor projection (governance-core-contract.json:33834), manifest, and closeout-pack-plan.json are mutually consistent on id/risk/unit-count/range/upstream/next, and the CP00-514 plan entry confirms RP17 begins at P00.M00.S01. Distribution integrity holds across deliverable counts (claude_review 12, implementation 51, security_audit 8, test 4, ui 4, hermes_evidence 1 = 80), micro-phase row counts (8/22/20/20/10), and per-section row titles in registry, contract cp513_requirements, manifest, and baseline included_units. All 7 required public exports exist and are correctly wired (createGovernanceCoreCp513P09CloseoutHandoffSliceCaseSet/Descriptor in service.js; validateGovernanceCoreCp513Coverage, validateGovernanceCoreCp513P09CloseoutHandoffSliceDescriptor, createGovernanceCoreCp513HermesEvidencePacket/ClaudeReviewPacket/CloseoutHandoff in validators.js), with imports resolved across registry→service→validators and re-exported via index.js. Tests (model.test.js:2230-2282) and the contract validator (validate-rp16-governance-core-contract.mjs, deepEqual on current_pack, cp513_requirements, cp513_no_write_attestation, and descriptor projection) assert the boundaries; command-evidence.json shows all gates exit 0 including npm test, npm run validate, npm run rp16:governance-core:validate, and git diff --check. Boundary integrity is sound: grep found no write/exec/network/env usage in packages/governance/src; attestations and freezeCp513Result set all runtime/write/leak flags false; every descriptor row carries descriptor_only=true, runtime_execution=false, customer_safe_errors_only=true, raw_payload_included=false. The authority boundary is preserved — Claude is read-only and explicitly not final approver, enterprise trust is not claimed from local validation, human final approval is required for runtime opening, and the Hermes packet is deterministic descriptor evidence (receipt_shape descriptor_only...no_write) rather than embedded product runtime. The pack-level production_ready claim is false (status implemented_pending_review, runtime_ready false), which is appropriately conservative and correctly leaves this review as the gate; the forbidden_review_evidence set covers auth failures, zero-byte, malformed/fenced JSON, tool-call-shaped output, and final-approval/enterprise-trust claims per CP178+ hardening. Unrelated dirty files (progress-control-room, workbook docs) are correctly excluded from pack scope, and post-review artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json, raw-output.json, review-receipt.json) are absent as expected for this pre-receipt stage of the hardened sequence. No P0–P3 defects were identified.

commit_policy.message: Close CP00-513 governance core p09 closeout handoff slice descriptor pack
